title: Episode 01/Credits
wikitext:
Credits for [[Episode 01]] of Neon Genesis Evangelion. ==Staff== Script: [[Hideaki Anno]]
Storyboards: [[Masayuki]], [[Hideaki Anno]]
Director: [[Kazuya Tsurumaki]]
Chief Animator: Shunji Suzuki
Assistant Character Designers: [[Yoshitoh Asari]], Seiji Kio, Yuh Imakake

Secondary Animation: Takahiro Onoda, Seiichiroh Shinokura, Studio Argo Ship, Studio Jungle Gym, Marsa Inc., Studio Deen
